title: fix(deps): update module tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface to v1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface) | `v0.8.1` -> `v1.0.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v1.0.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v1.0.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.8.1/v1.0.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/tags.cncf.io%2fcontainer-device-interface/v0.8.1/v1.0.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>cncf-tags/container-device-interface (tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface)</summary>

### [`v1.0.0`](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v0.8.1...v1.0.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Update description of CDI spec directories by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/217](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/217)
-   Remove deprecated oci and qualified-device APIs by [@​bart0sh](https://redirect.github.com/bart0sh) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/218](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/218)
-   Release table: add forgotten v0.5.0 change by [@​bart0sh](https://redirect.github.com/bart0sh) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/220](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/220)
-   Ignore issues / PRs with frozen labels for stale workflow by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/226](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/226)
-   Remove deprecated registry API by [@​bart0sh](https://redirect.github.com/bart0sh) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/219](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/219)
-   pkg/cdi: name cdi specs-go imports consistently. by [@​klihub](https://redirect.github.com/klihub) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/228](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/228)
-   Code cleanup by [@​bart0sh](https://redirect.github.com/bart0sh) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/223](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/223)
-   fixes: enable golanci-lint in CI, fix complaints. by [@​klihub](https://redirect.github.com/klihub) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/232](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/232)
-   Update golang.org/x/sys to v0.19.0 by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/237](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/237)
-   Document version match process by [@​bart0sh](https://redirect.github.com/bart0sh) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/238](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/238)
-   sortMounts stable and remove alphabetical order by [@​Epsilon314](https://redirect.github.com/Epsilon314) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/241](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/241)
-   Fix cache refresh on darwin by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/249](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/249)
-   Create schema submodule by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/248](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/248)
-   Bump golangci-lint version to v1.64.5 by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/251](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/251)
-   Ensure that YAML fields are sorted by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/236](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/236)
-   .github: run codespell for release branches, too. by [@​klihub](https://redirect.github.com/klihub) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/256](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/256)
-   Preparation for release 1.0.0 by [@​bart0sh](https://redirect.github.com/bart0sh) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/257](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/257)
-   Add RELEASE.md with steps to create a release by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/258](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/258)
-   Bump version to v1.0.0 by [@​bart0sh](https://redirect.github.com/bart0sh) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/260](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/260)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​Epsilon314](https://redirect.github.com/Epsilon314) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/241](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/241)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v0.8.1...v1.0.0

</details>
